creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-04-27 20:52:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/pecl-enchant Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Enchant is a binder for libenchant. Libenchant
  provides a common API for many spell libraries,
  such as aspell/pspell(intended to replace
  ispell),hspell(hebrew),ispell,myspell/hunspell
  (OpenOffice project, mozilla),uspell (primarily
  Yiddish, Hebrew, and Eastern European languages)
  
  WWW:   http://pecl.php.net/package/enchant/
  
  PR:             ports/122820
  Submitted by:   Wen heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1235    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/textproc/pecl-enchant/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/pecl-enchant/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/textproc/pecl-enchant/pkg-descr (new)
